patch.value: CI: smaller matrix on PRs, full matrix on main push only

PRs currently spin all 5 matrix entries (3 OS x Node 20 + Node 22 + Node 24 on Ubuntu). Trade off PR breadth for speed: PRs run only ubuntu/node20 + macos/node20 (catch cross-OS quickly); main push runs full 5-entry matrix. Saves 2 runner jobs per PR push, ~20min total runner minutes per PR cycle.
PRs run 2-entry matrix (ubuntu+macos on Node 20); main push runs the full 5-entry matrix; nightly continues full matrix; documentation reflects this in CONTRIBUTING.md.
